page_title: Despacho Bonsai — AI Co-Pilot for Your Entire Business
meta_description: Run your business and support your customers through simple conversations. Manage tools and talk to customers from one place.
meta_og_title: Despacho Bonsai — AI Co-Pilot for Your Entire Business
meta_og_description: Run your business and support your customers through simple conversations. Manage tools and talk to customers from one place.
meta_social_image_alt: Despacho Bonsai dashboard showing your AI operations manager in action
hero_title: If you sell online, you already know.
hero_subtitle: Customers on every channel at all hours. A business to run on top of that. There's an AI for both — and it starts free.
hero_image_alt: Despacho Bonsai dashboard showing conversations from multiple channels in a single inbox
pa_1_desc: Don't just schedule a post; ask the agent to check your Analytics, draft a campaign in Buffer, and log the data in HubSpot, all in one chat flow.
pa_2_desc: No intimidating blank prompt box. The agent proactively analyzes data and suggests workflows—like "I see site traffic is down, I suggest we schedule a promotional post." It's guided, not an open world.
pa_3_desc: No rogue autopilot. The agent prepares the work—drafts the calendar event, tees up the CRM entry—but absolutely nothing happens until you review and click "Approve."
support_transition_title: Once your operations are handled, automate your customer support.
trust_bar_label: Connect where your customers already are:
trust_bar_channels: WhatsApp · Instagram · Facebook · Email · Telegram · SMS
pain_1_problem: Customers message on 6 channels at all hours. Someone has to reply.
pain_1_solution: Your AI agent does. Across WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, email, and more — instantly, 24/7.
pain_2_problem: Running the business means checking Analytics, updating socials, follow up CRM.
pain_2_solution: Ask your executive agent. One conversation handles all of it — no tab-switching required.
personal_section_subtitle: Connect the AI you already use to the tools you already have. Free, forever.
personal_feature_title: Ask. It figures out the rest.
personal_feature_benefit: Plan, schedule, analyze, and follow up — without switching apps.
personal_feature_description: Connect Google Calendar, HubSpot, Buffer, and Google Analytics to Claude, ChatGPT, or Gemini. Then just ask. Schedule next week's posts, check last month's pipeline, pull a performance report — all in one conversation.
support_section_subtitle: 80% of customer questions are always the same. The agent handles those. You handle the other 20%.
features_title: Everything you need to actually respond well.
features_subtitle: No tab-switching. No dropped messages. No burned-out team.
feature_1_benefit: Stop checking 6 different apps to see if someone wrote.
feature_1_description: WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, email, Telegram — every customer conversation in one place. Your team responds from here. Nothing falls through.
feature_2_benefit: Responds instantly. Escalates when it counts.
feature_2_description: The agent handles the routine — hours, prices, availability, payment links. When a conversation needs a human, it escalates immediately with full context. You decide how it behaves and how it sounds.
feature_3_benefit: Everyone sees everything. Nobody drops the ball.
feature_3_description: Assign conversations, leave internal notes, use saved replies for the things that always come up. Everyone sees the same picture. Nobody answers the same message twice. Customers feel known.
personal_visual_user_question: How did our website do today?
ai_section_title: 80% of your customer questions are always the same.
ai_section_subtitle: The agent answers those. You handle the other 20%.
ai_classifier_description: Before replying to anything, the system reads the message's intent — is it a pricing question? A complaint? Something urgent? Based on that, it decides whether to respond on its own or hand the conversation to your team.
ai_escalation_description: If it detects frustration, urgency, or something outside its scope, it transfers the conversation instantly — no wait time, no lost thread. Your human agent arrives with full context already loaded.
ai_control_title: You define how far it goes.
ai_control_description: No black box. No decisions that take on a life of their own. The agent works within the limits you set. If you only want it handling FAQs and passing everything else to your team — that's exactly how it works.
ai_diagram_alt: Split diagram showing an incoming message passing through an intent node, then routing to either an automatic response or an immediate escalation to a human agent.
hiw_title: Up and running in minutes. Genuinely.
hiw_step_1_details: WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, email — add them from the dashboard in a few clicks. No code, no APIs, no support ticket. Each channel shows up as its own inbox or unified, your call.
hiw_step_2_details: Assign the agent to whichever channels you want. Tell it about your business — products, prices, policies, hours. The more it knows, the better it handles things. Add saved replies for payments, bookings, or anything critical.
hiw_step_3_details: Add resources the agent can share: a Calendly link for bookings, your payment details, your catalog, whatever. The agent knows when to use them. You set the boundaries. It works within them.
hiw_step_1_img_alt: Dashboard showing available channels to connect: WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, email, Telegram
hiw_step_2_img_alt: AI agent configuration screen with a custom instructions field for business context
hiw_step_3_img_alt: Saved replies panel with examples: payment link, booking link, shipping info
plan_personal_subline: Bring your own Claude, ChatGPT, or Gemini.
plan_personal_feature_1: Executive agent connected to your tools
plan_personal_feature_2: Works on Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini — desktop and mobile
plan_personal_feature_4: No conversation limits. No credit card, ever.
plan_pro_conversations_anchor: That's 100 conversations a day, every day of the month.
plan_pro_conversations_tooltip: We'll email you if you get close. We don't cut the bot off — we have a conversation about it.
plan_pro_feature_2: Support bots on WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, email, Telegram, and web
plan_pro_feature_3: Unified inbox — your team and the bot, one place
plan_pro_feature_4: Google Calendar and HubSpot for your bots
quote_1: I was spending 4 hours a day in the store's DMs trying to respond to everyone. Now we have one inbox, clear rules, and zero unread messages.
quote_3: Managing social channels for 10 clients was a nightmare. With centralized scheduling, we save hours of work every week.
quote_5: Speed is everything in real estate. Seeing all the Facebook and social inquiries on one screen helps us close deals much faster.
quote_2: The best part is that whoever's covering WhatsApp always knows what promotions are running. No more 'let me check and get back to you.'
cta_title: Your business doesn't stop. Your customer support shouldn't either.
privacy_intro: At Despacho Bonsai we take the privacy of your data and your customers' data seriously. This policy explains what we collect, how we use it, and how we protect it.
privacy_s1_content: We collect the information you provide directly when creating your account and setting up your workspace, including your name, email address, and payment data processed securely by Stripe.
privacy_s2_content: We use your data exclusively to provide the service, process payments, send account-related communications, and improve the platform.
privacy_s2_details: We do not sell or share your information with third parties for advertising purposes. Ever.
terms_intro: By using Despacho Bonsai, you agree to these terms. They're straightforward and free of fine print designed to surprise you.
terms_s1_content: We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the platform in accordance with these terms. You are responsible for everything that happens under your account.
terms_s2_content: Your plan is billed monthly or annually depending on your choice. You can cancel at any time from your billing portal.
terms_s2_details: We don't issue refunds for partial periods, but we will never charge you after you cancel.
cookies_intro: We use cookies to keep the platform running correctly and to understand how it's being used. That's it.
cookies_s1_content: These are required for you to log in and navigate the platform. Without them, the service doesn't work.
cookies_s2_content: We use Google Analytics to understand which parts of the platform are most useful and where we can improve.
cookies_s2_details: You can disable analytics cookies at any time without affecting your use of the service.
en_only_msg: Your first month is free. No credit card
es_only_msg: Esta página solo está disponible en español.
